overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through a rainy neon-lit city at night. The player moves through covered walkways, open plazas, an underground market, and busy city streets with heavy atmospheric fog and futuristic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway passing by illuminated food advertisements and vending machines

entered.detail: large bright digital display showing animated content on the left wall
illuminated red advertisement showing burrito graphics and pricing
overhead concrete structure with embedded lighting fixtures
row of illuminated automated food and drink dispensers

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian walkway at night. The player moves forward past bright digital advertising screens and a prominent 'Burrito XXL' billboard. The environment is sheltered from the rain, with artificial lighting illuminating the concrete sidewalk and vending machines lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large corporate billboard

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with large illuminated billboard
ambient light increases as exiting covered area into open foggy space

agents.ego_description: walking through a metal gate into an open plaza area dominated by a massive billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking through the plaza

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH' with a portrait
black barred gate structure marking the transition between zones
outdoor benches and tables arranged near the billboard

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway through a metal security gate into an open plaza. A massive 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH' billboard dominates the left side of the frame. The environment becomes exposed to the rainy weather, with mixed lighting from the billboard and ambient city lights. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks through the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete ramp descending to underground level

events.description: begins descending ramp into lower underground level
lighting shifts to green neon glow as approaching underground market

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp leading into a lower underground concourse

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway with metal railings leading downward
elevated pedestrian bridge structure spanning above the ramp
vendor stall with bright green neon lighting visible at the bottom of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete ramp into a lower level of the city. The environment becomes more enclosed with concrete walls on both sides. An overhead walkway bridge is visible above, while green neon lighting from food stalls below becomes increasingly prominent as the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground food market with neon-lit vendor stalls

events.description: entering busy underground market area with multiple food vendors and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through an underground market past food vendors and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall counter arranging items
group of pedestrians walking through the market concourse

entered.detail: wooden vendor stalls with bright green neon tube lighting and canopies
large purple and pink billboard featuring a woman smoking with text 'FEEL THE CHEMISTRY'
green neon circular sign with 'OPEN' text
wooden tables displaying food items and goods

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an underground food market illuminated by vibrant green and purple neon lights. Multiple food stalls line the path, with vendors and pedestrians visible. A large 'FEEL THE CHEMISTRY' billboard dominates the far wall. The atmosphere is bustling with moderate crowd density in this sheltered indoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city sidewalk with traffic and towering digital advertisements

events.description: exits underground market back to street level with visible traffic
futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet street with glowing taillights

agents.ego_description: walking along a busy city sidewalk next to traffic, passing pedestrians with umbrellas in the rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking in the same direction
futuristic silver car driving on wet road with red illuminated taillights

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboards covering the sides of skyscrapers
tall lampposts casting light through the fog and rain
overhead signal gantries with red and green lights
reflective asphalt street with rain puddles and vehicle reflections
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the underground market back to street level, walking along a busy sidewalk in the rain. Tall buildings covered in massive digital billboards line the street. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet reflective road. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalk, and traffic lights hang overhead in the foggy night atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian walkway through a subterranean market and back into the rainy expanse of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins under a covered walkway past digital screens and a Burrito XXL billboard, moving forward until it passes through a metal security gate into an open, rain-slicked plaza dominated by a massive Sky High advertisement. The camera then descends a concrete ramp, leaving the open air behind as the environment narrows and the lighting shifts toward the vibrant green glow of a lower-level district. This descent leads directly into a bustling underground food market filled with purple and green neon stalls and a prominent Feel the Chemistry billboard, before the path opens up once more. Finally, the camera emerges from the underground depths back to the street level, moving along a foggy sidewalk where futuristic vehicles glide past reflective roads beneath towering digital billboards.
